titles.text: Sofia the Witch: Curse of the Monster Moon

descriptions.text:
You play as Sofia, a plucky little witch that will do whatever she can to save her friends from their terrible curse.

Using your two spells, Transmogrification and Bubble Bounce, explore levels, discover secrets, and save your friends.

Every 500 years the stars align with the lunar eclipse creating the fabled Monster Moon. The moon turns green and Curses the land turning the animals into MONSTERS.

It's up to you to save all your friends and remove the Curse of the Monster Moon.
